positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette, stylized to resemble clean forest fauna, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange linocut style. The central composition features three peaks of varying height, balanced with negative space. Strong, crisp contrast between the subjects and a plain, off-white background. Perfect for apparel printing, clean lines, bold shapes, vector illustration quality, high contrast, pop art feel, graphic design aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
